expectations.text: A single private static readonly field replaces the two duplicate inline Enumerable.Range expressions
expectations.evidence: Extracted 'private static readonly char[] PrintableAscii' in Gen.cs replacing both inline expressions.

expectations.text: Both Gen.Chars() and Gen.Strings() reference that shared field rather than computing inline
expectations.evidence: Chars() uses SampledFrom(PrintableAscii); Strings() resolves null at Gen layer using 'alphabet ?? PrintableAscii'.

expectations.text: dotnet test src/ passes after changes
No files outside Gen.cs were modified
expectations.evidence: Agent explicitly noted scope discipline — left StringStrategy.cs alone despite its duplicate expression now being dead code via public API.
